description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish Docs with AOT that triggers on push to tags and the doc-fix branch. For the ant-design-blazor repository owner, run a job on ubuntu-latest that checks out the code, sets up .NET SDKs and Node.js 16.x, prepares the AOT workload, publishes docs by fetching the latest tag, updating files, building and publishing the site, and then deploys to Azure Static Web Apps, Cloudflare Pages, and optionally Gitee and GitHub Pages.
